title: Canada Strikes Landmark Deal to Export Liquefied Natural Gas to Germany
summary_full: The agreement is important for both nations, as Canada seeks new markets away from the United States and Germany tries to diversify its energy supply.
summary_public: The agreement is important for both nations, as Canada seeks new markets away from the United States and Germany tries to diversify its energy supply.
